name: King of the Hill
author: AGP
description: Standard chess with one extra way to win: in addition to checkmate, you win instantly the moment your own king legally reaches one of the four central squares (d4, d5, e4, e5). All the usual chess rules apply -- castling, en passant, promotion, check/checkmate/stalemate, and the fifty-move, threefold-repetition and insufficient-material draws. White (player 1) moves first.
